name: compliance fetch: when paywalled:true, fetcher issues HTTP HEAD only (records etag/last-modified/content-length without downloading body)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/fetcher.sh" --framework-id iso-27001-a14 --paywalled --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --emit-metadata "$PWD/meta.json" && grep -E "method.*HEAD" meta.json 1>&2 && grep -E "etag|last_modified" meta.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: printf '#!/bin/bash\nif echo "$@" | grep -q HEAD; then echo HEAD-OK; exit 0; fi; exit 1\n' > upstream.sh && chmod +x upstream.sh
